channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: NFF Intervenes to Keep Uyo Stadium Properly Maintained
item.description: The Nigeria Football Federation (NFF) president, Ibrahim Gusau, don express serious concern over the state of football infrastructure for our national teams. According to am, the Super Eagles and othe...

item.title: Shortage of Women's Prisons in Canada Challenges Rehabilitation and Reintegration
item.description: Canada faces a significant shortage of women's prisons, which experts argue negatively impacts rehabilitation and reintegration for female inmates. Many women sentenced to federal time in provinces wi...

item.title: James Graham advises England squad to focus on World Cup rather than TV adaptation of 'Dear England'
item.description: James Graham, acclaimed playwright of the Olivier Award-winning production 'Dear England', has expressed his preference that the current England football team refrain from watching the forthcoming BBC...

item.title: Successful Launch and Docking of Dragon CRS-34 to the ISS with EuroSuit Testing
item.description: On May 15, 2026, SpaceX successfully launched the Dragon v2 CRS-34 cargo spacecraft from the SLC-40 pad at Cape Canaveral Space Force Station, Florida, carrying nearly three tons of supplies to the In...

item.title: Chaos Erupts Globally as Limited-Edition Swatch Launch Sparks Violence
item.description: The recent launch of Swatch's limited-edition 'Royal Pop' watch, a collaboration with luxury brand Audemars Piguet, triggered widespread disturbances across Britain, Europe, and the United States. Pri...

item.title: Kenya’s opposition unity may be weakening electoral impact, say analysts
item.description: The article argues that the Kenyan opposition’s strategy of forming broad coalitions may no longer be effective. Since the historic success of the National Rainbow Coalition in 2002, subsequent attemp...

item.title: Mamelodi Sundowns take 1-0 first-leg lead over AS FAR in CAF Champions League final
item.description: At Loftus Versfeld Stadium, Mamelodi Sundowns have secured a valuable 1-0 lead over Moroccan side AS FAR in the first leg of the CAF Champions League final. Aubrey Modiba netted the only goal of the g...

item.title: PNP reinforces due process and accountability for erring personnel
item.description: The Philippine National Police (PNP) has emphasized its commitment to uphold due process for officers under investigation for misconduct. PNP Chief Gen. Jose Melencio Nartatez Jr. stated that internal...

item.title: Will Ferrell and Chad Smith recreate their famous resemblance in SNL season finale monologue
item.description: On 16 May 2026, during the season finale of Saturday Night Live’s 51st season, host Will Ferrell experienced a humorous interruption when Red Hot Chili Peppers drummer Chad Smith appeared on stage in ...

item.title: Reece Walsh dropped from Queensland Maroons, Sam Walker to debut at halfback
item.description: In a significant shake-up for the Queensland Maroons ahead of the State of Origin series, star fullback Reece Walsh has been omitted from the team. According to reports, the Brisbane Broncos player is...

item.title: David Gilmour Worked as a Model Before Joining Pink Floyd
item.description: Before becoming the legendary guitarist and vocalist of Pink Floyd, David Gilmour briefly worked as a male model in the mid-1960s. In 1966, Gilmour lived in France and Spain while performing with his ...

item.title: Kitengela businessman Fortune Muthina Kinyanjui linked to cyber‑fraud syndicate as investigations continue
item.description: A Kitengela‑based businessman, Fortune Muthina Kinyanjui, has emerged in the spotlight after being linked to a fraud syndicate involved in cybercrime and SIM‑swap fraud dubbed the Mulot scam. The case...

item.title: Clash breaks out during protest against anti-encroachment drive in Kolkata's Park Circus, three police injured
item.description: On Sunday, a protest in Kolkata’s Park Circus area escalated into violence, resulting in injuries to three police personnel. The demonstration was organised in response to the recent bulldozer drive i...

item.title: Kenya adjusts World Under-20 trials due to US visa rules and age regulations
item.description: Kenya’s athletics authorities have had to reshuffle plans for the upcoming World Athletics Under-20 Championships in Eugene, Oregon, due to strict US visa requirements and tighter World Athletics rule...

item.title: Apple plans privacy-focused Siri update with auto-deleting chat feature
item.description: Apple is preparing a major update for its voice assistant, Siri, which is expected to be unveiled at the Worldwide Developers Conference in June 2026. The relaunch aims to reestablish Siri's relevance...

item.title: NBI Driver Tests Positive for Gunpowder Nitrates After Senate Gunfire Incident
item.description: According to the Southern Police District (SPD), the National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) driver connected to the recent shooting incident at the Senate building has tested positive for gunpowder ni...

item.title: Australian nurses call for urgent reforms to address staffing, workplace safety and pay
item.description: On International Nurses Day, the Australian Nursing and Midwifery Federation and the Australian College of Nursing highlighted critical challenges facing the nursing workforce. They called for immedia...

item.title: Museum of Illusions opens in Nairobi as interactive attraction blending art, science and fun
item.description: The Museum of Illusions has officially opened in Nairobi, bringing a new kind of entertainment and learning experience for both locals and visitors. Located at Laxcon Court on Swaminarayan Road in Par...

item.title: 60-Year-Old Woman Found Dead in Nakuru After Going Missing
item.description: Nakuru residents of Ening’ang’a village are in shock after the body of 60-year-old Mary Mwihaki was discovered inside her home. She had been reported missing for four days. According to neighbours, he...

item.title: Penrith Panthers Take on St. George Illawarra Dragons in Round 11 at Suncorp Stadium
item.description: The 2026 NRL Magic Round continued at Suncorp Stadium in Brisbane with the Penrith Panthers facing off against the St. George Illawarra Dragons in Round 11 of the Premiership. Fans were treated to an ...
